response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with strong backend and distributed systems skills, but lacks the required executive leadership experience. He does not have a track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people or operating as a CTO, and his exposure to Agentic AI and Fintech is limited compared to the deep architectural requirements of this role.
strengths: Extensive background in software engineering, including building high-throughput microservices and event-driven architectures.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive as the founder of an open-source, event-driven Geo-Data platform.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and has not demonstrated scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Missing deep domain expertise in AI-native fintech infrastructure, algorithmic working-capital, and real-time credit risk.
Experience with Agentic AI appears limited to recent developer tooling rather than architecting production-grade, stateful multi-agent trading systems.
